history.en: Developed in Australia in the 1970s by Mike Hodgens crossing Bull Terrier for tenacity, Greyhound for speed, and German Shorthaired Pointer for scenting ability and endurance to create the ultimate pig-hunting dog
history.zh: 1970年代在澳大利亚由迈克·霍金斯培育，通过牛头梗（坚韧）、灵缇（速度）和德国短毛指示犬（嗅觉与耐力）杂交，创造终极猎猪犬。

overview.en: The Bull Arab is a large, athletic breed developed in Australia during the 1970s for wild pig hunting. This hybrid dog combines the tenacity of the Bull Terrier, the speed of the Greyhound, and the scenting ability and endurance of the German Shorthaired Pointer. Bull Arabs are known for their loyalty, intelligence, protective instincts, courage, and high energy levels. They form strong bonds with their families and are naturally wary of strangers, making them excellent watchdogs. Despite their working heritage, they can be gentle and affectionate with proper socialization. Their temperament is generally stable, but they require an experienced owner who can provide firm, consistent leadership. They are not recommended for first-time dog owners due to their strength and stubbornness. Overall, the Bull Arab is a devoted companion for active individuals or families who can meet their exercise and training needs.
overview.zh: 阿拉伯斗犬是一种大型、运动能力强的犬种，于20世纪70年代在澳大利亚为野猪狩猎而培育。这种杂交犬结合了斗牛梗的坚韧、灵缇的速度以及德国短毛指示犬的嗅觉能力和耐力。阿拉伯斗犬以忠诚、聪明、保护欲强、勇敢和高能量著称。它们与家人建立深厚的情感纽带，天生对陌生人保持警惕，是优秀的看门犬。尽管有工作犬的背景，通过适当的社会化训练，它们也可以变得温和而深情。它们的性情通常稳定，但需要有经验的主人提供坚定且一致的领导。由于力量大且固执，不建议初次养狗者饲养。总的来说，阿拉伯斗犬是活跃个人或家庭忠实的伴侣，前提是能满足其运动和训练需求。

care.en: Bull Arabs have a short, dense coat that requires minimal grooming. Weekly brushing with a rubber curry comb or hound glove helps remove loose hair and keep the coat healthy. Bathing is only necessary when dirty, typically every 6–8 weeks. Their ears should be checked weekly for dirt or infection, and nails trimmed monthly to prevent overgrowth. Daily dental brushing is ideal to maintain oral health. Exercise is crucial: they need at least 60–90 minutes of vigorous activity daily, including running, fetch, or agility work. Without sufficient exercise, they may become destructive or develop behavioral issues. Regular veterinary check-ups every 6–12 months are recommended to monitor for common issues like hip dysplasia, ear infections, and skin allergies. Vaccinations, flea/tick prevention, and heartworm medication should be kept up to date. Early socialization and exposure to different environments are vital from puppyhood.
care.zh: 阿拉伯斗犬的毛发短而密，梳理需求低。每周用橡胶梳或猎犬手套梳理一次，有助于去除死毛并保持毛发健康。仅在脏污时洗澡，通常每6–8周一次。应每周检查耳朵以防污垢或感染，每月修剪指甲以防过长。理想情况下，每天刷牙以维护口腔健康。运动至关重要：它们每天需要至少60–90分钟的剧烈活动，包括跑步、接球或敏捷训练。运动不足可能导致破坏行为或行为问题。建议每6–12个月进行一次常规兽医检查，以监测髋关节发育不良、耳部感染和皮肤过敏等常见问题。应按时接种疫苗、进行跳蚤/蜱虫预防和心丝虫治疗。从幼犬时期开始，早期社会化及接触不同环境至关重要。

training.en: Training a Bull Arab requires patience, consistency, and positive reinforcement methods. This breed is intelligent but can be stubborn and independent-minded, so a firm yet gentle approach works best. Start obedience training and socialization as early as possible, ideally from 8 weeks of age. Use high-value rewards such as treats or toys to motivate them. Short, varied sessions of 10–15 minutes are more effective than long, repetitive drills. Bull Arabs respond poorly to harsh corrections or punishment, which can lead to fear or aggression. Focus on basic commands like sit, stay, come, and heel, and progress to advanced tasks like recall and off-leash control. Because of their strong prey drive, recall training is especially important. Crate training can help with housebreaking and provide a safe space. Enrolling in puppy classes or working with a professional trainer experienced with strong breeds is highly recommended. Consistent leadership and clear boundaries will build a well-mannered companion.
training.zh: 训练阿拉伯斗犬需要耐心、一致性和正强化方法。该犬种聪明但可能固执且独立思考，因此坚定而温和的方式最为有效。尽早开始服从训练和社会化，理想情况下从8周龄开始。使用高价值奖励如零食或玩具来激励它们。短而多样的训练课程（每次10–15分钟）比长时间重复训练更有效。阿拉伯斗犬对严厉纠正或惩罚反应不佳，这可能导致恐惧或攻击性。重点教授基本指令如坐、等待、来和随行，然后进阶到召回和脱绳控制等高级任务。由于它们强烈的猎物驱动，召回训练尤为重要。笼内训练有助于家庭训练并提供安全空间。强烈建议参加幼犬课程或与经验丰富的专业训犬师合作。一致的领导和清晰的界限将培养出举止得体的伴侣犬。

diet.en: Bull Arabs require a high-quality, protein-rich diet to support their muscular build and high energy levels. A balanced commercial dog food formulated for active or large breeds is a good foundation. Look for real meat (chicken, beef, lamb, or fish) as the first ingredient. Adult dogs typically need 3–4 cups of dry food per day, split into two meals, but portion sizes should be adjusted based on age, weight, activity level, and metabolism. Puppies require more frequent feeding (3–4 times daily) with a growth-formula diet. Avoid overfeeding to prevent obesity, which can exacerbate joint issues like hip dysplasia. Supplementation with omega-3 fatty acids (fish oil) can support skin and coat health. Fresh water must always be available. Treats should not exceed 10% of daily calories. Some Bull Arabs may have food sensitivities; if you notice skin or digestive issues, consult your vet for an elimination diet. Avoid feeding table scraps, especially toxic foods like chocolate, grapes, onions, and xylitol.
diet.zh: 阿拉伯斗犬需要高质量、富含蛋白质的饮食，以支持其肌肉发达的身体和高能量水平。适合活跃或大型犬的均衡商业狗粮是不错的基础。选择以真实肉类（鸡肉、牛肉、羊肉或鱼肉）为首要成分的产品。成年犬通常每天需要3–4杯干粮，分两餐喂食，但份量应根据年龄、体重、活动水平和新陈代谢调整。幼犬需要更频繁的喂食（每天3–4次），并采用成长配方狗粮。避免过度喂食以防肥胖，肥胖会加剧髋关节发育不良等关节问题。补充欧米伽-3脂肪酸（鱼油）有助于皮肤和毛发健康。必须随时提供新鲜饮用水。零食不应超过每日热量的10%。部分阿拉伯斗犬可能有食物敏感问题；如果发现皮肤或消化问题，请咨询兽医进行排除饮食法。避免喂食剩饭剩菜，尤其是有毒食物如巧克力、葡萄、洋葱和木糖醇。

livingTips.en: The Bull Arab is best suited to a home with a securely fenced yard where it can run and play freely. Apartment living is not ideal unless the owner can provide multiple daily long walks and vigorous exercise sessions. This breed has a strong prey drive and may chase small animals, so a high, sturdy fence is essential. They are generally good with children if raised with them and properly socialized, but supervision is recommended due to their size and boisterous nature. Bull Arabs can be territorial and may not tolerate other dogs of the same sex, especially unfamiliar ones. Early socialization with other pets is important, but they may still view cats or small pets as prey. They are not recommended for homes with small rodents or birds. Bull Arabs thrive on human companionship and should not be left alone for long periods; they can develop separation anxiety and destructive behaviors. They do best with an active owner or family who can include them in daily activities and provide a structured routine.
livingTips.zh: 阿拉伯斗犬最适合有安全围栏庭院的家庭，以便自由奔跑和玩耍。公寓生活不太理想，除非主人能提供每日多次长时间散步和剧烈运动。该犬种猎物驱动力强，可能追逐小动物，因此需要高而坚固的围栏。如果从小一起长大并经过适当社会化，它们通常对孩子友善，但由于体型大且活泼，建议监督。阿拉伯斗犬可能有领地意识，不一定容忍同性别的其他犬只，尤其是陌生犬只。早期与其他宠物社会化很重要，但它们仍可能将猫或小宠物视为猎物。不建议有小型啮齿动物或鸟类的家庭饲养。阿拉伯斗犬依赖人类陪伴，不应长时间独处；它们可能产生分离焦虑和破坏行为。最适合活跃的个人或家庭，能将它们纳入日常活动并提供有规律的生活。
